title: Cross-Checkpoint Portability of Subject-Identity LoRA Fine-Tunes in SDXL
description: Training pipeline, configuration, and methodology for a personal-identity SDXL LoRA fine-tune, examining whether a LoRA trained against one SDXL-derivative checkpoint (Juggernaut XL) transfers to other SDXL derivatives (e.g. DreamShaper XL Turbo) without retraining, and why it cannot transfer to an architecturally distinct base such as SD1.5. See docs/methodology.md for the full write-up.
